title: ヴィクトリー倶楽部、参上！

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Welcome, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: This is the Victory Club!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume Children
text_block_list.text: Welcome!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As the sun shines high above on this tranquil day,
I find myself surrounded by children.
choice_data_list: Thank you very much for inviting me!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Now then, everyone! It's time to show this Tracen
Academy trainer how hard you work!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume Children
text_block_list.text: Yeaaah!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Victory Club is a famous group dedicated to
training young Umamusume.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It comprises a highly talented team and boasts an
impressive track record, having produced several
famous racers.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
To continue my development as a trainer, I've
come here today to observe the Victory Club in
action.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
We'll be training outside today, so be careful you
don't hurt yourselves!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume Children
text_block_list.text: Okaaay!
choice_data_list: You two are former members of this club, right?
You two are former members of this club, right?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Yes! I'll be happy to answer any questions you
have as class representative—wait a moment, I
guess I'm a club alum today!
choice_data_list:
I hear there are a lot of Umamusume with the
name "Sakura" here, is that true?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Many Umamusume who bear the Sakura name
have joined this club—Sakura Bakushin O and
Sakura Chiyono O among them.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Well, you see, Trainer...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Those with "Sakura" in their name are just
naturally drawn to the Victory Club!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: It's our destiny! All Sakuras are fated to join us!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Um, well... My mom was a member of this club, so
that's how I got connected to it.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I think one reason there are so many Sakuras here
is that our members value those connections very
much.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Come to think of it, my mom's a Victory Club
alum too! Ha-ha-ha-ha!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Next, I observe the youngsters as they train. Their
regimen is just as grounded in theory as I'd expect
from such a famed club.
choice_data_list: This really is some first-class training.
This really is some first-class training.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Right! And since the club members are all young
children, we ensure that the training sessions
don't become too much of a physical burden.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
They incorporate games like dodgeball into
training to break up the monotony. I imagine the
children love the variety.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume Children
text_block_list.text:
Ouch!
It hurts!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Oh no!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
All of a sudden, one of the children is in pain
after a big tumble!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Stop, Trainer! Don't help her up!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: The motto of the Victory Club is...

text_block_list.name: Umamusume Child
text_block_list.text: Don't lose spirit! Stay positive and keep going!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Exactly! Remember, you're a member of this club
too! You're a strong kid who can get back up on
your own!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Are you injured? Try moving your foot around.
...Okay, it looks fine. Why don't you see if you
can stand up?

text_block_list.name: Umamusume Child
text_block_list.text: R-right! I'll try!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Okay, get ready! All together now! VICTORY!

text_block_list.name: Bakushin O & the Child
text_block_list.text: VICTORY!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With that, the young girl puts all her strength into
her legs, then proudly stands up before dashing
off to rejoin the other children.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
So, Trainer! What do you think of the Victory
Club?
choice_data_list: Now I know why you two are such great runners.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
So, Trainer! What do you think of the Victory
Club?
choice_data_list: Now I know why you two are such great runners.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Everyone in this club believes in their fellow
members. They work together to overcome any
difficulty.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! Now you get it! I'm so proud to have been a
member of this club!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
We're like two carrots that grew in the same
patch!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Victory Club is a passionate organization
whose members form strong bonds and support
each other.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today, I learned another way to show someone
kindness besides just lending them a helping
hand.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, children with the Sakura name are tough,
aren't they?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
You can expect great things from all the young
members of the Victory Club!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With my enthusiasm for training rekindled, I feel
like I can't afford to rest on my laurels!
